name: ossec_security
explanation: OSSEC is a host-based intrusion detection system. The integration spec contains only a `logs` template (UDP listener at a user-supplied `<PORT>`) and ships no Agent metric check (no <name>.py beyond `__init__.py`). Setup requires the user to configure OSSEC to forward syslog to the Agent and to pick a port; there is no upstream service running alongside the Agent that auto-config could probe. The `<PORT>` placeholder reflects user policy, not a discoverable property.
notes: Logs-only tile, similar in shape to pattern N. No metric check, no auto_conf.yaml. Discovery is structurally inapplicable.
